Then `φ ∘ (fun ω => fun k : ↥A => Y ↑k ω) = (fun ω => fun k : ↥A => (Y ↑k ω - ∫ x, Y ↑k x ∂μ)/s)` definitionally. Each `φ`/`ψ` is measurable by `measurable_pi_lambda` with each coordinate `(measurable_pi_apply k).sub measurable_const |>.div_const s`.
